medicalroomt3.name: Medical Room (Tier 3)
medicalroomt3.description: A medical bunker used to treat critically wounded soldiers at the front line.

fortartillerysheltert3.name: Artillery Shelter Room (Tier 3)
fortartillerysheltert3.description: A sheltered bunker that improves the resistance against artillery of adjacent bunkers at the cost of structural integrity.

observationbunkert3.name: Observation Bunker (Tier 3)
observationbunkert3.description: A radio bunker that provides intel to friendly units about the surrounding area. Built from solid concrete, this reliable structure can push its effective range beyond lesser fortified radio structures, and is equipped with binoculars that give occupants a greater field of view.

ammoroomt3.name: Storage Room (Tier 3)
ammoroomt3.description: A facility that stores equipment and ammunition for artillery. Retrieval is very quick for this structure.

engineroomt3.name: Engine Room (Tier 3)
engineroomt3.description: An engineering facility used to supply power to the whole Bunker.

fortflamet3.name: Fire Suppression Room (Tier 3)
fortflamet3.description: A bunker with a mechanical station that will automatically spray water in the event of a fire. Includes a pipe connection.

fortweatherstationpart.name: Weather Station Parts
fortweatherstationpart.description: The final critical components necessary to construct a towering Weather Station. Must be placed onto a Large Structure Foundation.

forwardbase1.name: Encampment
forwardbase1.description: A temporary forward operating base. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

foundation_1x1.name: Foundation (1x1)
foundation_1x1.description: A foundation that provides a suitable surface for constructing Facilities.

foundation01t3.name: Concrete Foundation (1x1)
foundation01t3.description: A foundation that provides a suitable surface for constructing Facilities.

foundation_1x2.name: Foundation (1x2)
foundation_1x2.description: A foundation that provides a suitable surface for constructing Facilities.

foundation011x2t3.name: Concrete Foundation (1x2)
foundation011x2t3.description: A foundation that provides a suitable surface for constructing Facilities.

foundation_2x2.name: Foundation (2x2)
foundation_2x2.description: A foundation that provides a suitable surface for constructing Facilities.

foundation012x2t3.name: Concrete Foundation (2x2)
foundation012x2t3.description: A foundation that provides a suitable surface for constructing Facilities.

foundation_corner.name: Foundation Corner (1x1)
foundation_corner.description: A foundation that provides a suitable surface for constructing Facilities.

foundation02t3.name: Concrete Foundation Corner (1x1)
foundation02t3.description: A foundation that provides a suitable surface for constructing Facilities.

foxhole.name: Foxhole
foxhole.description: A simple hole dug into the ground to provide infantry with makeshift cover from enemy fire.

freighter.name: BMS - Ironship
freighter.description: The Bassett Motor Society’s Ironship-class shipping vessel is used to freight shippable goods and heavy vehicles.

freighterlight.name: Das Krokodil by VAC
freighterlight.description: This deep water Venchin Auto Corporation light freighter is a sturdy vessel that specializes in seaport-to-seaport deliveries. As a deep water ship, Das Krokodil can’t safely reach land-based shipping structures.

fuel_container.name: Liquid Container
fuel_container.description: A container for storing high volumes of liquids. Nearby structures and vehicles can refill directly from this container.

fuel_silo.name: Liquid Silo
fuel_silo.description: An industrial silo for storing various types of Fuel.

insulation.name: Insulated Pipe
insulation.description: An insulating material to keep the pipe from freezing during harsh weather conditions.

fueltrailer.name: Rooster - Lamploader
fueltrailer.description: A simple towable trailer that holds various fuel sources and can be used to refuel vehicles.

garrisonfishhut2.name: Garrisoned House
garrisonfishhut2.description: An abandoned building in the world that has been fortified and garrisoned.

garrisonstation.name: Safe House
garrisonstation.description: A garrisoned strongpoint used in the defence of a town. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

garrisonstation1.name: Safe House
garrisonstation1.description: A garrisoned strongpoint used in the defence of a town. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

gatet1.name: Gate (Tier 1)
gatet1.description: A gate that provides access to a walled off area.

gatet2.name: Gate (Tier 2)
gatet2.description: A gate that provides access to a walled off area.

gatet3.name: Gate (Tier 3)
gatet3.description: A gate that provides access to a walled off area.

gunboat2c.name: Type B - “Lucian”
gunboat2c.description: This shoreline “bunker buster” packs quite the punch to any unfortunately positioned enemy emplacements. The Type B was gifted its colloquial name in jest in response to the discovery that its first-ever captain, Lucian Kelly, once served in the Caoivish Naval Command.

gunboat2w.name: 81f-f Ronan Blackguard
gunboat2w.description: A shore-strafing gunship, the Blackguard’s heavy mortar blitz makes short work of coastline bunker networks. Sporting ample storage for mortar shells means a no-frills approach to overall engineering. While the Blackguard may need a nearby escort, it more than makes up for it with pure guile.

gunboatc.name: Type C - “Charon”
gunboatc.description: A small, versatile naval jack of all trades. The “Charon” is fitted with a single mortar cannon and two tripod mounts. Effective at both shoreline assaults and hit and run tactics against larger vessels.

gunboatw.name: 74b-1 Ronan Gunship
gunboatw.description: The 74b-1 Ronan Gunship specializes in roaming between larger vessels at high-speeds and boring into their hulls with ease. It’s armed with multiple tripod mounts to support the midship high-explosive mortar cannon.

halftrackartilleryc.name: HH-d “Peltast”
halftrackartilleryc.description: This “Javelin” variant is fitted with a 360 degree mortar platform, designed to support infantry in frontline operations.

halftrackc.name: HH-a “Javelin”
halftrackc.description: Designed for escort missions and to support infantry operations, the HH-a class “Javelin” Half-Track is an armoured, versatile all-terrain vehicle that can be equipped with a variety of mounted weapons.

halftrackdefensivec.name: HH-b “Hoplite”
halftrackdefensivec.description: With reinforced armour at the expense of speed, the "Hoplite" is a formidable force in the heat of combat.

halftrackmultiw.name: Niska-Rycker Mk. IX Skycaller
halftrackmultiw.description: A first of its kind, the Skycaller is a variation of the Niska Motor Carriage with a Rycker designed rocket battery fitted in the rear bed. This unique armoured vehicle quickly fires rockets over long distances with ease, and can be rearmed and relocated at the drop of a hat. The Skycaller is the deadly result of combined Nevish and Caoivish engineering.

halftrackoffensivew.name: Niska Mk. II Blinder
halftrackoffensivew.description: Fitted with a heavy-duty anti-tank gun, the Blinder is capable of punching through all but the most tempered of alloys.

halftracktwinw.name: Niska Mk. III Scar Twin
halftracktwinw.description: The third Niska Motor Carriage variation sports twin mounted machine guns at the expense of reduced passenger shielding and overall firepower. This simple revision was originally an ad hoc alteration by field engineers, but quickly sought after by armour regiments across the Caoiva-Veli front line.

halftrackw.name: Niska Mk. I Gun Motor Carriage
halftrackw.description: Designed for escort missions and to support infantry operations, the Niska Gun Motor Carriage Half-Track is an armoured, versatile all-terrain vehicle that can be equipped with a variety of mounted weapons.

harvester.name: BMS - Scrap Hauler
harvester.description: The Scrap Hauler, designed by the Bassett Motor Society is a heavy-duty piece of machinery designed to reduce scrap metal and other materials into usable, raw resources. Scrap Haulers are often used to extract battlefield resources following skirmishes.

heavytruckc.name: AU-A150 Taurine Rigger
heavytruckc.description: Built to brave the hills in the western provinces of the Alliant Union, the Taurine Rigger is a Velian modified variation that specializes in towing heavy equipment and supplies over treacherous terrain. Employed in the Colonial Legion for near three centuries, the A150 has become an indispensable tool in Colonial operations. It’s no surprise then that it has been often imitated, yet never replicated.

heavytruckw.name: Cnute Cliffwrest
heavytruckw.description: This heavy-duty service vehicle has reinforced tires originally designed to haul large resource caches and heavy weapons along the craggy cliffs of Sorovia.

hospital.name: Hospital
hospital.description: A large medical facility for treating critically wounded soldiers returning from the battlefield.

intelcenter.name: Intelligence Center
intelcenter.description: A high-tech listening post designed to intercept and decode enemy transmissions. The Intelligence Center can target distant locations and will continue to decipher sensitive transmissions over a sustained period.

isgpillbox.name: Infantry Support Gun Pillbox
isgpillbox.description: This heavily reinforced pillbox allows the garrisoned infantry with a 30mm support gun to fire on approaching enemy armour from a safe position.

keep.name: Keep
keep.description: An old Keep. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

landingcraftc.name: AB-8 “Acheron”
landingcraftc.description: The "Acheron" is an armoured amphibious vehicle designed for carrying troops across large bodies of water to aid in coordinated beach landings and flanking assaults.

landingcraftoffensivec.name: AB-11 “Doru”
landingcraftoffensivec.description: With its mounted machinegun, the "Doru" is the perfect addition to any shoreline assault.

landingcraftw.name: Mulloy LPC
landingcraftw.description: The Mulloy Landing Personnel Carrier is an armoured amphibious vehicle designed for carrying troops across large bodies of water to aid in coordinated beach landings and flanking assaults.

landingdock.name: Dock
landingdock.description: A small-scale platform where ships can dock.

landingshipc.name: Interceptor PA-12
landingshipc.description: The Interceptor PA-12 is a vessel designed to transport friendly troops and light vehicles across large bodies of water.

landingshipw.name: MacConmara Shorerunner
landingshipw.description: The Shorerunner is a large vessel that ferries friendly troops and light vehicles to assault distant shores.

large_assembly_factory.name: Large Assembly Station
large_assembly_factory.description: A large Assembly Station for production of advanced vehicles and equipment, such as tanks and trains. Construction will take time and may be halted if resources are depleted.

aircraftassembly.name: Aircraft Assembly
aircraftassembly.description: An assembly station for producing advanced aircraft frames.

train_assembly.name: Train Assembly
train_assembly.description: An assembly station for producing train cars.

heavy_tank_assembly.name: Heavy Tank Assembly
heavy_tank_assembly.description: An assembly station for producing heavy tank class vehicles.

largefieldatc.name: 945g “Stygian Bolt”
largefieldatc.description: The “Stygian Bolt” Large Field Gun is fitted with a monstrous 94.5mm cannon paired with heavy angled blast shielding. Inspired by the rows of narrow canyons in their homeland of the Lacrista province, Mesean engineers designed this field weapon to keep its crew as safe from ancillary fire as possible while maintaining forward momentum.

largefieldcannonw.name: Balfour Stockade 75mm
largefieldcannonw.description: This robust field cannon not only allows infantry to fire heavy 75mm shells with ease, but it provides state-of-the-art curved blast shielding for maximum protection from crossfire.

largefieldlightartilleryc.name: 120-68 “Koronides” Field Gun
largefieldlightartilleryc.description: A long range Colonial mobile artillery used to lay siege to fortified positions.

largefieldmortarc.name: 40-250 “Alekto” Heavy Cannon
largefieldmortarc.description: Fitted with a larger, more advanced cannon and a sturdier chassis, this modification of the “Tisiphone” Field Cannon specializes in breaching assaults. What it lacks in overall versatility, it makes up for with a high firing arc, making it ideal for circumventing walled encampments.

largefieldmultiw.name: Rycker 4/3-F Wasp Nest
largefieldmultiw.description: Lyle Rycker first built a prototype of the Wasp Nest as a test for his rack mounted rocket batteries that would eventually find their way onto armoured vehicles. Capable of firing twelve compact rockets in quick succession, the Wasp Nest became a quick favourite of the Warden infantry testing it, so an official design was requisitioned.

largeshipaircraftc.name: Poseidon
largeshipaircraftc.description: The Poseidon-class Aircraft Carrier represents a masterwork of military might for both the Republic Coastal Legion and the Colonial Aeronautics Corps This massive vessel rivals even Titan-class battleships in scale. Upon launching the first ever aerial assault in the north, it became clear to the Mesean Senate that the sky was the future of warfare. Republic Command was quick to put concerted effort into further developing the Aeronautics Corps capabilities. Before a single plane marked by a Caoivish flag passed through clouds, the Poseidon had been launched. Following the success of the Poseidon, Combat Magister Curia was stripped of his position, having wasted resources investing in submersibles.

largeshipbaseship.name: BMS - Longhook
largeshipbaseship.description: The Bassett Motor Society’s premiere base ship, the BMS - Longhook is a sturdy, reliable vessel that provides an excellent centre of operations for building and maintaining smaller boats for ferrying personnel and equipment.

largeshipbattleshipaircraftw.name: Mercy
largeshipbattleshipaircraftw.description: The Mercy-class carrier, commissioned to aid the Alliance Sky Brigade in combating the rapid deployment of Colonial aircraft, is fitted with several launchpads to rapidly deploy aircraft from any oceanic location. Mercys were designed to be self-sufficient in defending against aerial bombardments and ship-to-ship defence. Originally, this class of ship had a different designation, but Bright Mercy, great-grandfather of Archon Fionn Mercy, had it changed once he’d seen it in person. To this day, the story goes that he fell to his knees and sobbed at the sight of it. “It was akin to witnessing a god.”

largeshipbattleshipc.name: Titan
largeshipbattleshipc.description: Long-feared on the open seas, Titan-Class battleships are spoken of in hushed tones and with great reverence. Fitted with a wide arsenal of cannons and gun emplacements, the Titan’s enemies will soon feel the crushing depths. The Republic Coastal Legion holds Titans as its Signifiers and entire fleets rally on their position. Modelled on the flagship of Ambrose Leon’s storied fleet, the Titan is a beacon of victory for the Mesean people.

largeshipbattleshipw.name: Callahan
largeshipbattleshipw.description: Callahan-class Battleships are massive, fully featured mobile bases. They pack enough firepower to devastate enemy naval vessels and their crew, or rain death on nearby shorelines while shrugging off punishment with its reinforced hull. Named for Caoiva’s founder and first Archon, who famously held fast in conflict with rival clans who wanted his head. Several Callahans remain anchored at Whedon’s Row Harbour.

largeshipdestroyerc.name: Conqueror
largeshipdestroyerc.description: Serving as the front line to the Republic Coastal Legion, long have Conquerors lived up to the namesake. These beasts are fitted with armaments to tackle threats both above and below, including a specialized sonar station and depth charge launchers. A young upstart, Diana Geminus, was first to command a Conqueror after quickly rising through the ranks with fresh ideas for defence against the northerner’s disgraceful efforts.

largeshipdestroyerw.name: Blacksteele
largeshipdestroyerw.description: Named for the unpainted look of an early prototype, the Blacksteele-Class Frigate is a highly manoeuvrable, albeit small-statured vessel. Deployment of “Trident” Submarines by the Republic Coastal Legion saw the Caoivish Naval Command respond in kind with the Blacksteele. Designed as a sub-hunter escort, the Blacksteele excels at thwarting submersible assaults against larger, ungainly ships. The head shipwright on the project was none other than Conor O’Brien’s top protégé, Rory Boyd, who, in his later years became known as a master shipwright, and largely recognised as the man behind the Caoivish Naval Command’s world-class reputation.

largeshipresourceship.name: BMS - Bowhead
largeshipresourceship.description: This BMS shipping vessel, the Bowhead, is specially designed to carry large quantities of resource containers and fitted with compartments for resource Harvesters. Named for a great whale, the Bassett Motor Society ensures that resources get delivered to the front lines where they’re needed and when they’re needed due to efficient loading bay design and a sturdy frame.

largeshipstorageship.name: BMS - Bluefin
largeshipstorageship.description: The Bluefin storage ship is a massive, all-purpose mobile naval yard capable of storing crates of resources, packed vehicles and ammunition for long-distance travel and beach-to-beach equipment ferrying. The Bassett Motor Society is proud to deliver such a cutting-edge, versatile blue water asset to various countries across Raka, Katoma, and the Alliant Union.

largeshipsubmarinec.name: AC-b “Trident”
largeshipsubmarinec.description: The AC-b or “Trident”-class submersible brings much-needed versatility to the Republic Coastal Legion. Featuring a quick-loading ammo bay, the “Trident” is capable of quickly re-arming and returning to the hunt. Combat Magister Curia commissioned the skilled engineers out of Dimiourg to develop a submersible to help counter the rapidly progressing naval technology deployed by the Wardens and Nevish Alliance. Much of the senate criticised Curia for this decision, as they believe it more prudent to invest resources into airborne warfare innovations. After witnessing the return and redeployment of several successful trial AC-b operations, it wasn’t hard to convince the Senate.

largeshipsubmarinew.name: Nakki
largeshipsubmarinew.description: This Nevish vessel excels in punching holes in the hulls of the Colonial fleet. Armed with Moray Torpedos and state-of-the-art sonar technology, the Nakki is a silent killer. Famously, three Nakkis crept behind a Colonial fleet at night and picked them apart one by one, leading to Prefect Evander to call a retreat. Their “Legion” was not at all prepared to be assaulted from under the waves.

light_vehicle_assembly_station.name: Small Assembly Station
light_vehicle_assembly_station.description: A standard Assembly Station for production of essential vehicles and equipment. Construction will take time and may be halted if resources are depleted. Some projects require a base vehicle to be present on the Assembly Station before production can begin.

shipassembly.name: Naval Works
shipassembly.description: An assembly rigged to manufacture parts used in the construction of naval vessels at a Dry Dock.

motor_pool.name: Motor Pool
motor_pool.description: An assembly station for producing light-duty logistics vehicles like trucks.

rocket_factory.name: Battery Line
rocket_factory.description: An assembly station for producing half-tracks and rocket vehicles.

field_station.name: Field Station
field_station.description: An assembly station for producing field weapons and utility vehicles such as Harvesters.

tank_factory.name: Tank Factory
tank_factory.description: An assembly station for producing tank class vehicles.

weapons_platform.name: Weapons Platform
weapons_platform.description: An assembly station for producing emplaced weapon platforms and specialized tanks.

rocketassembly.name: Advanced Structure Manufactory
rocketassembly.description: A workshop platform for the assembly of large, multi-part constructs such as the A0E-9 Rocket and Storm Cannon.

lightboatinfantryc.name: K-81e “Sombre”
lightboatinfantryc.description: The “Sombre” is an escort gunship that excels at deterring air-to-naval aggression. Fitted with paired machine gun turrets and boasting a heavier frame than most vessels of comparable size, this Kraunian-made K81e emerges at a moment’s notice to defend its charge.

lightboatinfantryw.name: 68A-4 Ronan Fathomer
lightboatinfantryw.description: This naval escort ship excels at sea-to-air engagements, providing friendly naval vessels with critical protection from enemy aircraft. The 68-series remains one of Patrick Ronan’s favourite designs. Having been commissioned by the Watchers to aid in coastal investigations, this modification—given the designation A-4—has since eclipsed its forebear’s ubiquity.

lighttank2infantryc.name: HC-2 “Scorpion”
lighttank2infantryc.description: The “Scorpion” HC-class tank is a moderately armoured infantry support vehicle with twin, high-powered heavy machine guns and short-range radios for improved intelligence support. In addition, exterior seating is available for infantry.

lighttankartilleryw.name: Devitt-Caine Mk. IV MMR
lighttankartilleryw.description: A modified Devitt fitted with a specialized Caine mortar turret at the expense of top speed.

lighttankc.name: H-5 "Hatchet"
lighttankc.description: A highly maneuverable lightweight tank. Designed for urban environments, the “Hatchet” is fitted with a 40mm cannon.

lighttankdefensivew.name: Devitt Ironhide Mk. IV
lighttankdefensivew.description: The Ironhide Light Tank is similar to the Mk. III but reinforced with plates of heavy steel at the expense of speed and maneuverability.

lighttankflamec.name: H-19 “Vulcan”
lighttankflamec.description: This modified “Hatchet” features a reinforced fuel cell fixed to its rear alongside a flamethrower turret. This light tank can launch litres of burning fuel a fair distance, while its crew remains protected behind light armour plating.

lighttankmobilityc.name: H-8 “Kranesca”
lighttankmobilityc.description: The “Kranesca” Light Tank is fitted with an overpowered engine and a reinforced chassis, capable of boosting its top speed at the expense of overall acceleration and maneuverability.

lighttankoffensivec.name: H-10 “Pelekys”
lighttankoffensivec.description: The “Pelekys” H-class light tank is heavily modified with an open top chassis and equipped with a devastating long-range anti-tank cannon.

lighttankw.name: Devitt Mk. III
lighttankw.description: A highly maneuverable lightweight tank. Designed for urban environments, the Devitt is fitted with a 40mm cannon.

liquid_transfer_station.name: Liquid Transfer Station
liquid_transfer_station.description: Metal drums for storing various fuels that can be transferred into and out of Facilities. Stockpiles are public.

lrartillery.name: Storm Cannon
lrartillery.description: A heavy fixed position artillery piece that can release devastating firepower on distant enemy targets.

maintenance_tunnel.name: Maintenance Tunnel
maintenance_tunnel.description: Prevents the decay of nearby structures when supplied.

massproduction.name: Mass Production Factory
massproduction.description: A manufacturing plant for large-scale production of military equipment.

material_transfer_station.name: Material Transfer Station
material_transfer_station.description: A space marked for storing refined materials that can be transferred into and out of Facilities. Stockpiles may be public or reserved.

materials_factory.name: Materials Factory
materials_factory.description: A factory that refines raw resources into Construction Materials for advanced facilities. Additional modifications allow for the development of a variety of different materials.

forge.name: Forge
forge.description: A unique factory for forging specialized machinery parts needed to construct vehicles. Requires Coke or Petrol.

metal_press.name: Metal Press
metal_press.description: A heavy automatic press that refines materials into a denser form.

recycler.name: Assembly Bay
recycler.description: An assembly bay with specialized equipment for quickly building and packing materials needed on the frontline.

smelter.name: Smelter
smelter.description: An industrial smelter for melting down Salvage to remove impurities. Requires Coke.

materialtrailer.name: Rooster - Tumblebox
materialtrailer.description: A simple towable trailer that holds heavier building materials.

mediumboatc.name: Strider
mediumboatc.description: A small but sturdy naval weapons platform excelling in ship-to-ship combat. Deadly to both enemy vessels and crew, the Type D comes fitted with starboard and port-facing machine guns alongside bow and stern-facing cannons.

mediumboatw.name: Rinnspeir Ornitier-Class Gunship
mediumboatw.description: Known as the “Bounty Hunter of the Sea”, the Ornitier is a deadly ship-to-ship weapons platform. While not as manoeuvrable as smaller vessels, its sturdy frame allows it to take much more punishment. Twin gunwale-mounted cannons provide ample firepower to punch holes in enemy ships, while its bow-mounted RPG launcher ends any chase before it has a chance to begin.

mediumtank2c.name: 86K-a “Bardiche”
mediumtank2c.description: Unlike the 85-series, the "Bardiche" sports a heavier, more durable build and is fitted with a coaxial heavy machinegun along with a powerful, short-barrelled 68mm turret. Modern Kraunian engineering allows for a fast reload, making it an ideal tool to combat enemy armour.

mediumtank2indirectw.name: Gallagher Thornfall Mk. VI
mediumtank2indirectw.description: Armed with a rack of Bonesaw mortar launchers, the Thornfall is designed to launch an indirect mechanized assault on enemy armour. This unique vehicle supports an allied assault and cannot withstand large amounts of punishment.

mediumtank2multiw.name: Gallagher Highwayman Mk. III
mediumtank2multiw.description: Colm Gallagher’s engineers designed a variation of the Outlaw that features an independently rotating MG turret sitting atop the main armament of twin anti-tank cannons. What it lacks in raw firepower compared to its older sibling, the Highwayman more than makes up for it with versatility.

mediumtank2rangew.name: Gallagher Outlaw Mk. II
mediumtank2rangew.description: Originally designed in response to increasing swarms of Mesean armour, the Outlaw is an exceptionally capable medium tank armed with a long-range 40mm turret and includes a built-in storm rifle support position.

mediumtank2twinc.name: 86K-c “Ranseur”
mediumtank2twinc.description: This evolution of the “Bardiche” is fitted quad-mounted RPG launchers paired with a high-velocity 12.7mm cannon. The “Ranseur” indicates progress in Kraunian design as they continue to leverage outdated equipment to create deadly, modern armour.

mediumtank2w.name: Gallagher Brigand Mk. I
mediumtank2w.description: The first of Colm Gallagher’s mid-sized tanks, the Brigand is a true brute on the battlefield. Not quite as sturdy as its younger siblings, the Brigand compensates with higher mobility, which, when paired with a mounted machine gun and 30mm repeater cannon, is a deadly force in any armour division. Seeing his hometown sundered at the hands of the Swords in a border skirmish before the onset of the Boreal Wars, Gallagher grew fixated on engineering a versatile yet sturdy tank. The Brigand was the result of his fixation.

mediumtank3c.name: 90T-v “Nemesis”
mediumtank3c.description: With immense off-road capabilities, the 90T-v “Nemesis” is a highly versatile armoured vehicle. While it may not boast the defensive capabilities of its more heavily armoured cousins, the “Nemesis” shatters enemy formations with its deadly 68mm cannon and auxiliary grenade launcher. This unique vehicle earned its namesake on its first deployment during an expedition into the Alliant Union. A Nevish Alliance armed convoy was crossing through wetlands when a wave of 90T-v tanks intercepted the convoy from between reeds and murky terrain.

mediumtankatw.name: Silverhand Lordscar - Mk. X
mediumtankatw.description: A cut down variation of the Silverhand Assault Tank that sacrifices armour and protection in favour of a high-powered 94.5mm cannon. This open-top weapon platform is uniquely designed to intercept enemy armour before they’re given time to retaliate. Its moniker is a tribute to the maiming of the great king the Silverhand is named for; while his title was stripped, and his pride damaged, his rage was never quelled.

mediumtankc.name: 85K-b “Falchion”
mediumtankc.description: Designed for mass-production in Kraunia, this assault tank features a modular turret system for maximum versatility. The “Falchion” class features a powerful if understated, 40mm cannon.

mediumtanklargec.name: 85V-g "Talos"
mediumtanklargec.description: The "Talos" is a Velian modification to the 85-series, fitted with an oversized 75mm cannon. Knowing that such a heavy cannon would likely not be suitable, the engineers built it to disperse weight in such a manner that the 85-series chassis could bear it.

mediumtankoffensivec.name: 85K-a “Spatha”
mediumtankoffensivec.description: The “Spatha” assault tank features a unique and destructive 40mm turret that fires high-velocity shells. This specialized turret is not as well suited to mass-production as its more refined counterpart, the “Falchion.”

mediumtanksiegew.name: Silverhand Chieftain - Mk. VI
mediumtanksiegew.description: The Chieftan assault tank is fitted with asymmetrical armaments, including a 250mm mortar cannon and a twin-barrelled 12.7mm turret.

mediumtankw.name: Silverhand - Mk. IV
mediumtankw.description: The Silverhand assault tank is fitted with destructive dual-barrel armaments, and heavy frontal and rear armour. Its 68mm frontal cannon is paired with a lighter 40mm turret.

metalworks_factory.name: Metalworks Factory
metalworks_factory.description: A factory for refining raw resources into Processed Construction Materials. Additional modifications can allow for additional refined materials needed for advanced facility operations.

recycler.name: Recycler
recycler.description: Advanced sorting machinery for sifting piles of scrap metal for useful materials.

blast_furnace.name: Blast Furnace
blast_furnace.description: A large industrial cauldron for liquefying metals to remove impurities from advanced materials.

engineering_station.name: Engineering Station
engineering_station.description: An expanded workshop for manual process of delicate materials.

mgpillbox.name: Machine Gun Pillbox
mgpillbox.description: A well-fortified bunker position fitted with a mounted machinegun. Garrisoned infantry will lay down heavy suppressive fire upon approaching enemies from a fixed angle.

mineboat.name: Bellweather by VAC
mineboat.description: A simple vessel designed to lay out and maintain naval mines. Manufactured by the Venchin Auto Corporation, the Bellweather was originally commissioned by the Wenitan Naval Guard. Sensing further opportunities to profit, VAC began marketing the Bellweather to navies beyond Katoma, finally reaching Caoivish shores.

minespline.name: Prepared Minefield
minespline.description: A prepared area for creating anti-tank and anti-infantry minefields.

tankminespline.name: Abisme AT-99 Minefield
tankminespline.description: Anti-tank minefield designed with a heavy payload for disabling enemy vehicles. Only visible when nearby.

infantryminespline.name: Crow’s Foot Minefield
infantryminespline.description: Anti-infantry minefield that deliver a fatal payload to unsuspecting soldiers. Only visible when nearby.

mortartankc.name: HC-7 "Ballista"
mortartankc.description: The HC-Class “Ballista” is a heavy tank designed to obliterate opposition defenses with its 250mm Hades Mortar Cannon.

motorboat.name: BMS - Grouper
motorboat.description: Powered by the Bassett Motor Society’s lightweight Grouper engine, this simple wooden boat is ideal for ferrying small groups of infantry across rivers and between islands.

motorcyclec.name: 03MM “Caster”
motorcyclec.description: A motorcycle and sidecar used to patrol large areas. Speed can be boosted at the cost of additional fuel.

motorcycleoffensivec.name: 00MS “Stinger”
motorcycleoffensivec.description: The cab of this Motorcycle is fitted with an LMG for fast-response hit and run assaults.

motorcyclew.name: Kivela Power Wheel 80-1
motorcyclew.description: A Warden motorcycle used in patrols and fitted with a sidecar. The Kivela Power Wheel can also gain a momentary speed boost by burning additional fuel.

observationtower.name: Observation Tower
observationtower.description: An Observation Tower that provides intel on friendly and enemy forces in an area.

oil_refinery.name: Oil Refinery
oil_refinery.description: A refinery that processes Oil into other useful materials for the purposes of production and power generation.

reformer.name: Reformer
reformer.description: A large processing drum that allows for the controlled introduction of hydrogen to yield a similar output of Petrol for less raw Oil.

cracking_unit.name: Cracking Unit
cracking_unit.description: A high-heat furnace that catalyses raw oil into refined Heavy Oil.

petro_plant.name: Petrochemical Plant
petro_plant.description: A blast furnace that further refines Heavy Oil into an Enriched Oil needed for advanced processes.

oil_well.name: Oil Well
oil_well.description: Extracts fuel from Oil Fields. Must be constructed nearby.

electric_oil.name: Electric Oil Well
electric_oil.description: A generator that leverages electricity to pump oil through attached pipes.

fracking_oil.name: Fracker
fracking_oil.description: A machine that opens up cracks in the earth by injecting water at a high pressure to increase the output of Crude Oil.

oilfield.name: Oil Field
oilfield.description: An Oil Field that can produce Oil for further refinement or for power production.

oiltankerc.name: RR-3 “Stolon” Tanker
oiltankerc.description: The “Stolon” Tanker is a heavier R-series rig designed to transport and distribute large quantities of Fuel.

oiltankerw.name: Dunne Fuelrunner 2d
oiltankerw.description: The Fuelrunner is a heavy Dunne rig designed to transport and distribute large quantities of Fuel.

pipeline.name: Pipeline
pipeline.description: Industrial piping that allows for automatic transport of various liquids and fuels into a network of pipes that connect to various facility structures.

insulation.name: Insulated Pipe
insulation.description: An insulating material to keep the pipe from freezing during harsh weather conditions.

pipeline_overhead.name: Pipeline (Overhead)
pipeline_overhead.description: Industrial piping that allows for automatic transport of various liquids and fuels. These specialized pipes can be built overhead to connect to pipe networks across areas with high traffic.

insulation.name: Insulated Pipe
insulation.description: An insulating material to keep the pipe from freezing during harsh weather conditions.

pipeline_underground.name: Pipeline (Underground)
pipeline_underground.description: Industrial piping that allows for automatic transport of various liquids and fuels. These specialized pipes can be built underground to connect to pipe networks across areas with high traffic.

insulation.name: Insulated Pipe
insulation.description: An insulating material to keep the pipe from freezing during harsh weather conditions.

pipeline_valve.name: Pipeline Valve
pipeline_valve.description: A weighted valve that controls the rate of flow through a pipeline. Requires a Wrench to adjust.

insulation.name: Insulated Pipe
insulation.description: An insulating material to keep the pipe from freezing during harsh weather conditions.

playerc.name: Player (Colonial)
playerc.description: The Colonials are described as a faction of ingenuity and practicality. They are sometimes referred to as "The Colonial Legion" or "Little Green Men".

playerw.name: Player (Warden)
playerw.description: The Wardens are described to be a nation of honor and tradition. They are the native inhabitants of the region where the game takes place.

power_box.name: Power Switch
power_box.description: A power interface for manually disabling power in a circuit.

power_line.name: Power Line
power_line.description: Conducts power between a Power Pole and another structure.

power_pole.name: Power Pole
power_pole.description: Used to connect Power Lines. Up to 4 Power Lines can be attached to a single pole.

lamp.name: Lamp
lamp.description: A light that illuminates the surrounding area. Requires at least a minimum amount of power to function.

power_station.name: Power Station
power_station.description: A power plant that generates a large amount of electricity using Oil or Coal.

sulfuric_reactor.name: Sulfuric Reactor
sulfuric_reactor.description: A reactor that combines Water with Heavy Oil or refined Coke, resulting in a more pure natural gas, which in turn is more efficient at generating power. Chunks of raw Sulfur are created as a byproduct.

provisional_road.name: Provisional Road
provisional_road.description: A temporary road used to enable vehicle access between main roads and remote bases.

rail_large_crane.name: Crane Railway Track
rail_large_crane.description: A segment of railway for heavy cranes. This type of railway can only be built on Foundations.

rail_large_gauge.name: Railway Track (Biarc)
rail_large_gauge.description: A segment of railway for train cars. Tracks can attach to or fork from existing railways to form complex networks.

rail_small_gauge.name: Small Gauge Railway Track (Biarc)
rail_small_gauge.description: A segment of railway for small gauge train cars. Tracks can attach to or fork from existing railways to form complex networks.

refinery.name: Refinery
refinery.description: A Refinery for converting raw resources into materials.

relicapc.name: Heavy Infantry Carrier
relicapc.description: An armoured landship reinforced with an alloy now lost to time. This nearly indestructible beast carries up to 8 passengers. Whispers of its existence date back to the first breaching.

relicarmouredcar.name: Armoured Fighting Tractor
relicarmouredcar.description: A recovered Colonial prototype once found in early mechanized warfare. Built on the frame of a powerful tractor, this amoured vehicle was seen escorting soldiers or, later, in support of larger armoured forces.

relicbase1.name: Relic Base
relicbase1.description: An old fort. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

relicbase2.name: Relic Base
relicbase2.description: An old fort. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

relicbase3.name: Relic Base
relicbase3.description: An old fort. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

reliclighttank.name: Storm Tank
reliclighttank.description: A light armoured mechanized vehicle first seen in early border skirmishes between Caoiva and Veli. With its thin frame, it was deployed in wide formations, often overwhelming enemy forces.

relicmediumtank.name: PL-1 “Phalanx”
relicmediumtank.description: Ancient by modern standards, this first iteration heavily armoured Colonial Assault tank is fitted with full coverage shielding and equipped with twin sponson cannons.

relicscoutvehicle.name: Staff Car
relicscoutvehicle.description: A vehicle once used by officers to survey the battlefield, or to deliver emergency supplies and orders.

relictruck.name: Repurposed Truck
relictruck.description: A sturdy old farmer's truck that's been reinforced for military use.

resource_transfer_station.name: Resource Transfer Station
resource_transfer_station.description: An open container marked for storing raw resources that can be transferred into and out of Facilities. Stockpiles are public.

resourcecontainer.name: Resource Container
resourcecontainer.description: A container that can carry large quantities of resources and can be transported by certain vehicles.

resourcefield.name: Resource Field
resourcefield.description: This is a resource field. This can be mined by a player or with a stationary harvester.

resourcetrailer.name: Rooster - Junkwagon
resourcetrailer.description: A simple towable trailer that holds common building resources.

riflepillbox.name: Rifle Pillbox
riflepillbox.description: A reinforced dugout that gives the garrisoned rifle infantry a fortified defensive position to fire on approaching enemies from relative safety.

rocketpartbottom.name: A0E-9 Rocket Booster
rocketpartbottom.description: The control fins, fuel lines, and propulsion engines required for launch are all housed within the A0E-9 Booster system.

rocketpartcenter.name: A0E-9 Rocket Body
rocketpartcenter.description: The body of an A0E-9 stores the fuel and instrumentation required to deliver the warhead over large distances.

rocketparttop.name: A0E-9 Rocket Warhead
rocketparttop.description: The A0E-9 Warhead is a devastating explosive, capable of taking out city districts or even entire small towns. It scorches the landscape, making it hard for the enemy to rebuild in the short-term.

rocketsite.name: A0E-9 Rocket Platform
rocketsite.description: A specialized launch platform designed to facilitate the assembly and firing of devastating A0E-9 Ballistic Missile, colloquially known as the AEON Rocket.

sandbaghalfspline.name: Sandbag Cover
sandbaghalfspline.description: A defensive wall that hinders enemy movement and provides cover during combat.

sandbagfullspline.name: Sandbag Wall
sandbagfullspline.description: A defensive wall that hinders enemy movement and provides cover during combat.

scouttankmultiw.name: King Jester Mk. I-1
scouttankmultiw.description: Originally designed as a mock-up for more sophisticated rocket platforms, the Jester gets its designation from the response to reckless early prototypes that were bolted onto stripped-down King Spires. This unusual vehicle fires powerful short-range breaching rockets. Its light frame makes it easy to reposition but vulnerable to sabotage.

scouttankoffensivew.name: King Gallant Mk. II
scouttankoffensivew.description: A heavily armoured variant of the King Spire, the Gallant Mk. II boasts a weighty 30mm cannon at the cost of top speed.

scouttankw.name: King Spire Mk. I
scouttankw.description: This small tank has been recently recommissioned to the Warden arsenal. It boasts high maneuverability and an antenna that allows for long-range communications during high-stakes recon operations.

scoutvehiclemobilityc.name: UV-05a “Argonaut”
scoutvehiclemobilityc.description: This stripped down Light Utility Vehicle provides extra seating for a small crew to engage in hit and run tactics.

scoutvehicleoffensivec.name: UV-24 “Icarus”
scoutvehicleoffensivec.description: This RPG-mounted Light Utility Vehicle provides a heavy-duty weapons platform with superior speed. Perfectly suited for assaulting enemy structures and vehicles, or supporting an armoured assault.

scoutvehicleoffensivew.name: Drummond Spitfire 100d
scoutvehicleoffensivew.description: This LMG-mounted Light Utility Vehicle provides a heavy-duty weapons platform with superior speed. Perfectly suited for supporting flanking infantry or an armoured assault.

scoutvehicleutilityc.name: UV-5c “Odyssey”
scoutvehicleutilityc.description: This simple, modified Utility Vehicle is fitted with a reinforced hatch to provide one crew member with increased visibility for intense recon operations.

scoutvehicleutilityw.name: Drummond Loscann 55c
scoutvehicleutilityw.description: This amphibious Light Utility Vehicle has been heavily modified to cross rivers and lakes with ease. Venturing out into the open sea is ill-advised, however.

scoutvehiclew.name: Drummond 100a
scoutvehiclew.description: A multipurpose off-road Warden vehicle that can scout nearby targets.

scrapmine.name: Salvage Mine
scrapmine.description: An old mine that automatically gathers Salvage using Fuel.

seaport.name: Seaport
seaport.description: A large building used to store crates, vehicles, boats, and shippable structures.

shippart1.name: Naval Hull Segments
shippart1.description: Foundational elements required to construct the hulls of large naval vessels.

shippart2.name: Naval Shell Plating
shippart2.description: Highly resistant external plating used to protect naval vessels from damage and wear.

shippart3.name: Naval Turbine Components
shippart3.description: A series of intricate gears, turbines, and engines used in large naval vessels.

shippingcontainer.name: Shipping Container
shippingcontainer.description: A container for shipping very large quantities of Crates using Crane loaded vehicles. This type of container can only be unloaded at Storage Depots and Seaports.

smalltraindump.name: BMS Railtruck
smalltraindump.description: A small gauge container car for transporting raw materials.

smalltrainengine.name: BMS Mineseeker
smalltrainengine.description: The Mineseeker is the Bassett Motor Society’s mechanized mule. This small 0-4-0 locomotive can haul tonnes of weight over short distances with little overhead. Ideal for a mining operation or short-range supply chains.

smalltrainfuelcontainer.name: BMS Tinderbox
smalltrainfuelcontainer.description: The Tinderbox is a simple car used for transporting liquids between facilities.

smalltrainresourceplatform.name: BMS Linerunner
smalltrainresourceplatform.description: A low profile flatbed car for transporting large resources and munitions over short distances on small gauge tracks.

smalltrainshipping.name: BMS Stowheel
smalltrainshipping.description: A simple boxcar used for transporting common goods.

stationary_harvester_coal.name: Stationary Harvester (Coal)
stationary_harvester_coal.description: A stationary harvester that automatically gathers Coal.

excavator.name: Excavator
excavator.description: An excavator that allows for the mining of Coal even when a Coal Field is depleted

stationary_harvester_components.name: Stationary Harvester (Components)
stationary_harvester_components.description: A stationary harvester that automatically gathers Components.

excavator.name: Excavator
excavator.description: An excavator that allows for the mining of Damaged Components even when a Component Field is depleted

stationary_harvester_scrap.name: Stationary Harvester (Salvage)
stationary_harvester_scrap.description: A stationary harvester that automatically gathers Salvage.

excavator.name: Excavator
excavator.description: An excavator that allows for the mining of Salvage even when a Salvage Field is depleted

stationary_harvester_sulfur.name: Stationary Harvester (Sulfur)
stationary_harvester_sulfur.description: A stationary harvester that automatically gathers Sulfur.

excavator.name: Excavator
excavator.description: An excavator that allows for the mining of Sulfur and a small amount of coal even when a Sulfur Field is depleted

storagebox.name: Storage Box
storagebox.description: A shared storage container that can be used to stash item.

storagefacility.name: Storage Depot
storagefacility.description: A large building used to store crates, vehicles, and shippable structures.

sulfurmine.name: Sulfur Mine
sulfurmine.description: An old mine that automatically gathers Sulfur using Fuel.

supertankc.name: O-75b "Ares"
supertankc.description: Armed with a dual 75mm turret, what the “Ares” lacks in speed and versatility, it more than makes up for with raw destructive power. Development of the “Ares” was fraught with strife, and its history is intertwined with a period of several riots erupting on the streets of Dimiourg. Rebels commandeered the first “Ares” Prototype, the O-75a, and turned it against Colonial forces in the region, ultimately leading to its destruction—albeit not without great effort. This event wove the great behemoth into the tapestry of Colonial legend.

supertankw.name: Cullen Predator Mk. III
supertankw.description: This gargantuan beast is the brainchild of Gray Cullen. Once thought impossible, the Predator was Cullen’s idea of how a great ship might operate on land. It boasts two sets of quad-barrelled grenade launches and a heavy-duty 94.5mm forward facing cannon. While limitations of ground-based travel posed certain restrictions on the scope of the project, Cullen wasn’t deterred and made necessary adjustments to meet his vision of the ideal land ship.

surfacewaterminespline.name: E681-B Hullbreaker Minefield
surfacewaterminespline.description: A specialized sea minefield that floats near the surface, causing destructive damage to ship hulls.

tankettec.name: T12 “Actaeon” Tankette
tankettec.description: This complete overhaul of the T3 Armoured Car is reinforced with tank armour. While these extra defenses lower the T12’s overall speed and handling, the addition of treads provide increased performance in less than ideal terrain.

tanketteflamec.name: T14 “Vesta” Tankette
tanketteflamec.description: The first T-class tankette to utilize this sturdier frame and versatile treads, the Vesta also represents the Velian’s first foray into fire weapons. The “Vesta” boasts a light flame turret and ample storage for the additional fuel supply required.

tankettemultic.name: T13 “Deioneus” Rocket Battery
tankettemultic.description: Initially intended to provide a mobile platform for cumbersome field weapons, the T13 “Deioneus” Rocket Battery is a lightweight tankette fitted with a nine-barrelled rocket artillery. This unique battery is configured for incendiary rockets to be launched at range while maintaining high maneuverability between deployments.

tanketteoffensivec.name: T20 “Ixion” Tankette
tanketteoffensivec.description: A bombastic variant of the T12 Tankette, the “Ixion” provides its crew with more support and a mounted Infantry Support Gun. Added weight from the armour results in reduced overall speed.

tankmine.name: Abisme AT-99 Mine
tankmine.description: A simple mine that is placed under terrain and fitted with a pressure-sensitive plate to detonate under the weight of heavy vehicles. Mines are visible to friendlies and enemies on foot.

tankstop.name: Tank Trap
tankstop.description: An anti-tank obstacle that prevents vehicle access to an area. Can be dismantled with a Wrench.

tankstopsplinet3.name: Dragon's Teeth
tankstopsplinet3.description: An anti-tank obstacle that prevents vehicle access to an area, and is resistant to most types of damage.

townbase1.name: Town Base
townbase1.description: A garrisoned focal building vital for the defence of a town. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

townbase2.name: Town Base
townbase2.description: A garrisoned focal building vital for the defence of a town. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

townbase3.name: Town Base
townbase3.description: A garrisoned focal building vital for the defence of a town. Players can spawn and stockpile items here.

townwsmall1.name: Emplacement House
townwsmall1.description: A mannable mortar structure used in the defence of a town.

traincaboose.name: BMS Roadhouse
traincaboose.description: A simple caboose that allows rail crews to maintain tracks more efficiently.

traincoal.name: BMS Rockhold
traincoal.description: A container car for transporting coal to refuel trains over long-distance trips.

traincombatcarc.name: Aegis Steelbreaker K5a
traincombatcarc.description: Known across the colonies as King of the Rails, this heavily armoured train car is designed to protect and exert dominance over contested rail lines, especially when transporting supplies into contested territory as well as safely transporting infantry. This armoured beast boasts a forward facing cannon, as well as heavy lateral guns.

traincombatcarw.name: O’Brien Warsmith v.215
traincombatcarw.description: In his later years, O’Brien nearly died in an attack on a military passenger train while travelling to Whedon’s Row. In response, he put his team to work designing not only an infantry car that offered powerful protection to any locomotive, but one that just the sight of it would run off all but the most committed of attackers—Namely its thick armour plating and powerful twin turrets.

trainengine.name: BMS Black Bolt
trainengine.description: One of the most storied mass-market 0-6-2 locomotives engineered by the Bassett Motor Society, this coal-powered industrial train engine is reliable, tested, and incredibly durable. The Black Bolt’s legacy is unmatched having aided the Bassett Motor Society in supplying countries across the globe.

trainflatbed.name: BMS Longrider
trainflatbed.description: A flatbed car for transporting large resources and munitions by train over long-distances.

trainhospital.name: BMS Bloodtender
trainhospital.description: This unique train car has been specially fitted with medical equipment and a mounted machine gun, making it ideal for transporting injured soldiers away from active battlefields to the safety of hospitals. When stationary, the BMS Bloodtender may also be used as a mobile first aid centre to treat wounded soldiers so long as supplies remain plentiful.

traininfantry.name: BMS Holdout
traininfantry.description: An armoured train car with a mounted machinegun position for transporting infantry safely over long distances.

trainlrartillery.name: Tempest Cannon RA-2
trainlrartillery.description: All the power of a stationary Storm Cannon, but easily relocated via rails. This devastating cannon is capable of leveling enemy fortifications at very large distances.

tree.name: Tree
tree.description: A tree featured throughout the world of Foxhole.

trenchbuildsite.name: Trench Dig Site
trenchbuildsite.description: A build site that serves as the foundation for constructing a trench. Connects to other Bunkers and Trenches.

trenchconnectorbuildsite.name: Trench Connector Dig Site
trenchconnectorbuildsite.description: A build site that serves as the foundation for constructing a trench connector. Connects to other Bunkers and Trenches.

trenchconnectort1.name: Trench Connector (Tier 1)
trenchconnectort1.description: A dugout that's used for cover and as passageways between Bunkers. Connects to other Trenches and Bunkers. This is a special Trench variant that can resize dynamically and can be built underneath roads.

barbedwire.name: Barbed Wire
barbedwire.description: Slows down enemy infantry attemping to invade this Trench.

sandbags.name: Sandbags
sandbags.description: A defensive barrier that hinders enemy movement and provides cover during combat.

trenchconnectort2.description: A dugout that's used for cover and as passageways between Bunkers. Connects to other Trenches and Bunkers. This is a special Trench variant that can resize dynamically and can be built underneath roads.

trenchconnectort3.name: Trench Connector (Tier 3)
trenchconnectort3.description: A dugout that's used for cover and as passageways between Bunkers. Connects to other Trenches and Bunkers. This is a special Trench variant that can resize dynamically and can be built underneath roads.

trenchroof.name: Trench Roof
trenchroof.description: Provides cover against enemies that have entered this Bunker

trenchempbuildsite.name: Trench Emplacement Dig Site
trenchempbuildsite.description: A build site that serves as the foundation for constructing a trench emplacement. Connects to other Bunkers and Trenches.

trenchempt1.name: Trench Emplacement (Tier 1)
trenchempt1.description: A dugout that's used for cover and as passageways between Bunkers. Connects to other Trenches. This variant can also serve as an emplacement for mannable defenses.

trenchempt3.description: A dugout that's used for cover and as passageways between Bunkers. Connects to other Trenches. This variant can also serve as an emplacement for mannable defenses.

trenchintt1.description: A dugout that's used for cover and as an intersection between Bunkers and Trenches.

trencht1.description: A dugout that's used for cover and as passageways between Bunkers. Connects to other Trenches and Bunkers.

bridge.description: Allows vehicles to cross over this Trench.

truckc.name: R-1 Hauler
truckc.description: A heavy-duty Colonial truck used to mobilize troops and supplies.

truckdefensivew.name: Dunne Leatherback 2a
truckdefensivew.description: A heavy, reinforced Dunne transport. Fitted with a heavier frame, the Leatherback is capable of enduring more punishment at the cost of initial acceleration.

truckdumpc.name: R-5 “Atlas” Hauler
truckdumpc.description: This standard Truck is fitted with a resource hopper in place of the standard cargo hold. This allows for a much greater capacity for resources at the expense of space for cargo.

truckdumpw.name: Dunne Loadlugger 3c
truckdumpw.description: This standard Truck is fitted with a resource hopper in place of the standard cargo hold. This allows for a much greater capacity for resources at the expense of space for cargo.

truckmobilityc.name: R-5b “Sisyphus” Hauler
truckmobilityc.description: This variation of the standard R-5 Hauler is fitted with an improved suspension and axle system resulting in better overall handling. However, these improvements may not hold up under severe weather conditions.

truckmobilityw.name: Dunne Landrunner 12c
truckmobilityw.description: This standard Truck is fitted with rugged off-road treads, allowing for more efficient movement on rough terrain and conditions at the expense of maximum speed.

truckmultic.name: R-17 “Retiarius” Skirmisher
truckmultic.description: A truck fitted with an advanced rocket propulsion rack, the “Retiarius” webs the sky with deadly, screeching rockets shot at a high frequency over long distances. Holds sixteen rockets.

truckoffensivec.name: R-9 “Speartip” Escort
truckoffensivec.description: This standard Truck is fitted with Light Machinegun in place of the passenger seat. It’s well suited as an escort for convoys or lightly armoured operations.

truckw.name: Dunne Transport
truckw.description: A heavy-duty Warden truck used to mobilize troops and supplies.

wallsplinet1.name: Wall (Tier 1)
wallsplinet1.description: A basic barrier that is used to prevent passage through an area.

wallsplinet2.name: Wall (Tier 2)
wallsplinet2.description: A barrier that is used to prevent passage through an area.

wallsplinet3.name: Wall (Tier 3)
wallsplinet3.description: A barrier that is used to prevent passage through an area.

watchtower.name: Watch Tower
watchtower.description: Reports nearby enemy movements to players with Radios equipped

water_pump.name: Water Pump
water_pump.description: Pumps water through pipes. Must be built on bodies of water.

electric_water.name: Piped Water Pump
electric_water.description: Adds a pump for pressurizing a pipe for water. Adds an output port for a pipe.

waterminespline.name: E680-S Rudder Lock Minefield
waterminespline.description: Designed for underwater deployment, Sea Mines detonate upon contact with enemy vessels.

weatherstation.name: Weather Station
weatherstation.description: A high-tech meteorological module built on solid foundations within a bunker network. These stations aid operators in predicting weather patterns. Multiple Weather Station modules may be chained together to make more accurate predictions, allowing armies to prepare for even the worst of conditions.

world_road.name: Public Road
world_road.description: A public road featured throughout the world of Foxhole.
